name: Tortilla Soup 2
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Monterey Jack or Cheddar cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, sauté onion, garlic, and green chiles in oil until soft.
2. Add tomatoes, chicken broth, and beef bouillon. Mix in spices.
3. Simmer for 1 hour.
4. Cut tortillas into quarters, then into 1/2-inch strips.
5. Fry the strips in hot oil until crisp, then drain.
6. Add the fried tortilla strips to the soup and simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Ladle the soup into bowls and top with shredded cheese.
